{{Quote|The legends, the whispers, the rumors—they are all true. Listen to them and tremble at my name.|San'sii|<ref name="Agents of Deception">{{SWGTCG|set=Agents of Deception|swglink=San'sii_the_Kursk_(card).JPG|cardname=San'sii}}</ref>}}
'''San'sii "the Kursk"''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who became the leader of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-using organization known as the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:ToO" /> During his time as leader he recruited many non-Force-sensitive individuals into the Blackguard, which went against Blackguard tradition.<ref name="JATM">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref> He along with a large portion of the Blackguard were killed by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]].<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Biography==
[[File:Sansii-TrialsOfObiWan.jpg|thumb|left|250px|San'sii standing alongside another member of the Blackguard]]
San'sii was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who joined the Force-using organization known as the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] prior to or during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He rose to become the leader of the group, a position known as the [[Kursk]], and became one of its strongest members.<ref name="SWG:ToO" /> Whilst head of the group he felt that the cult was too small, and introduced a new rule allowing non-Force-sensitive individuals to join to boost numbers. This broke tradition running back to the founding of the group after the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]] by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vulta Daanat]]. The new troops quickly filled out the Blackguard's ranks and soon became the most visible part of the faction, leading many who encountered the group to believe they were simply a paramilitary organization rather than a Force-using cult.<ref name="JATM" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] named [[Mi Fon Lu]] wished to research within the [[Southern Jedi Ruins]] in which the Blackguard made their home. However, fearing for his safety amongst the Blackguard, he hired [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to clear out the ruins. San'sii was killed along with many adepts of the Blackguard in the ruins.<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Weapons and equipment==
[[File:SansiiCombat-TrialsOfObiWan.jpg|thumb|left|250px|San'sii and his underling engaging in a deadly battle against a group of spacers]]
San'sii used a [[Color/Legends|red]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in combat as did most members of the Blackguard. However instead of the normal Blackguard masked uniform, San'sii wore the [[Cloak of the Kursk]], a unique robe worn only by the leader of the Blackguard. After his death, the cloak was taken by the spacers who killed him.<ref name="SWG:ToO" />

==Behind the scenes==
San'sii first appeared as an enemy in the [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' as part of the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' expansion released in [[2005]]. ''Star Wars Galaxies'' was shut down on [[December 15]], 2011. In the game he appeared as an elite enemy whom players had to kill as part of the quest "An Archaeologists Problem." He later received a card in the [[Agents of Deception]] expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]] released in [[2009]]. San'sii was also mentioned as the most recent leader of the Blackguard in the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|Saga Edition]] [[Roleplaying game]] supplement book the ''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]'', which also established that he introduced the policy of recruiting non-Force sensitives into the Blackguard.
